CustomField.description: Stores the API name of the source field on the Data Import object (DataImport__c). The data import process reads values from this field and maps them to the corresponding target field on the destination object.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of the field on the Data Import object that contains the source data (e.g., Contact1_Firstname__c).
CustomField.label: Source Field API Name
